name: SP8192 + QK5 + Freeze10 Loss-Gated Legal TTT
blurb: Single-seed legal 8xH100 run on the PR1413 SP8192 + QK5 stack with freeze10 loss-gated score-first TTT. Train 588.005s, final legal_ttt_exact 1.08885521 BPB, total size 15,994,383 bytes. This is a competitive 10min/16MB submission that beats the naive baseline by a wide margin, but it is not presented as a new-#1 SOTA claim.
author: muhammed.erin95
architecture: 11L/512d/8H/4KV, MLP 4x, QK gain init 5.0, loop structure from the PR1413 stack, GPTQ int6 matrices + int8 embeddings, freeze10 loss-gated legal score-first TTT

attribution.legal_ttt_precedents: merged score-first TTT precedent in the official repo

our_contribution: Freeze the first 10 blocks during TTT, adapt the final block only, and gate TTT updates using a running-mean loss threshold while staying byte-legal and under the train/eval limits.
